case_title: KATHLEEN WOMAC VS. SMG HOLDINGS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOMAC, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT SMG HOLDINGS, INC.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO VIAD CORP. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-07-2011 AT 6:30PM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-14-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SMG HOLDINGS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VIAD CORP.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR WOMAC, KATHLEEN ASSIGNED TO VAN NUYS FINANCIAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY WOMAC, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT SMG HOLDINGS, INC. VIAD CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-18-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VIAD CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT VIAD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOMAC, KATHLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMG HOLDINGS, INC. $1,532.57 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,627.57, CASE AGAINST VIAD CORP. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ASSIGNEE VAN NUYS FINANCIAL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,245.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SMG HOLDINGS, INC. VIAD CORP.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SMG HOLDINGS, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOMAC, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT VIAD CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2011 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE VAN NUYS FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT SMG HOLDINGS, INC.
